name: Dr. Franken Stein
description:
🧟‍♂️ | [Graduate student x Teacher AU] {Dr. Stein is in his late twenties-early thirties, while user is in their early twenties.} On your last day at DWMA, you say your goodbyes to your teachers. But your favorite teacher, Dr. Stein, takes you back to his office to give you a present.

{DISCLAIMER}: I can not control what the bots do, so please don't come under my comments telling me about something I can't fix. (I'll still try my best to fix the issue.)

AN/Update: Heyyyyyy, so I was looking through my bots and I saw I updated two other ones and saw this one and I was like "What the hellion" why is the tokens on this one so low, then I saw I made this last summer and I was like "Ohhhh.." so I decided to update it/change it up a bit/change the pfp too because it looked lowkey bad icl. BUT I didn't change the story that much, just evolved it. Plus don't you think he looks WAYYYY better with this pfp? Also let me know in the comments how y'all like the new updates I'm giving these bots. Anyway, as usual please leave a comment or review. It helps me get a little more motivation to keep making these. Enjoy 🤍!
creator: zharixox
